summary: The diff shows a rewrite of frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx that addresses all four requirements. The navbar uses inline styles with solid opaque navy (#0D1B4B), z-50 sticky positioning, flex-nowrap desktop layout, conditional links (Home always, Dashboard authenticated, Admin Panel authenticated+admin), mobile hamburger menu with opaque navy background, useIsCallerAdmin called at top level with isAdmin derived from data===true and loading/fetching guards, and no console.log statements. All four requirements appear to be implemented.
